description:
AirPods desktop user experience enhancement program


1. Supported AirPods 4, AirPods 4 (ANC) and AirPods Pro 3. (#180 @Kashionz )
Sorry for keeping everyone waiting.
Thanks to SpriteOvO for inviting me to join the maintenance of this project. I had been quite busy recently and was not able to spend enough time maintaining it, so progress was slower than expected.
Going forward, I will do my best to work through the current issues and PRs step by step.
Thank you all for your patience.
